title: PolyAPI Variable
description: A variable or secret that is stored securely and injected into functions at runtime using a path identifier.

id.description: The unique identifier of the variable.

pathIdentifier.description: The path identifier used to reference this variable in functions (e.g., 'tutorial.apiKey').

secret.description: Whether this variable is stored as a secret.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the variable was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the variable was last updated.
